initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN drives dr ON d.driver_id = dr.driver_id
JOIN races r_first ON dr.year = r_first.year AND dr.first_round = r_first.round
JOIN races r_last ON dr.year = r_last.year AND dr.last_round = r_last.round
JOIN results res_first ON r_first.race_id = res_first.race_id AND d.driver_id = res_first.driver_id
JOIN results res_last ON r_last.race_id = res_last.race_id AND d.driver_id = res_last.driver_id
WHERE dr.year >= 1950 AND dr.year <= 1959
  AND dr.first_round < dr.last_round
  AND res_first.constructor_id = res_last.constructor_id
  AND res_first.constructor_id = dr.constructor_id;

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN drives dr ON d.driver_id = dr.driver_id
JOIN races r1 ON dr.year = r1.year AND dr.first_round = r1.round
JOIN races r2 ON dr.year = r2.year AND dr.last_round = r2.round
JOIN results res1 ON res1.race_id = r1.race_id AND res1.driver_id = d.driver_id
JOIN results res2 ON res2.race_id = r2.race_id AND res2.driver_id = d.driver_id
WHERE dr.year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1959
  AND dr.first_round < dr.last_round
  AND res1.constructor_id = res2.constructor_id
GROUP BY d.driver_id, d.forename, d.surname, dr.year, dr.constructor_id;

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN drives dr ON d.driver_id = dr.driver_id
JOIN races r1 ON dr.year = r1.year AND dr.first_round = r1.round
JOIN races r2 ON dr.year = r2.year AND dr.last_round = r2.round
JOIN results res1 ON res1.race_id = r1.race_id AND res1.driver_id = d.driver_id
JOIN results res2 ON res2.race_id = r2.race_id AND res2.driver_id = d.driver_id
WHERE dr.year >= 1950 AND dr.year <= 1959
  AND dr.first_round < dr.last_round
  AND res1.constructor_id = res2.constructor_id;

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN drives dr ON d.driver_id = dr.driver_id
JOIN races r1 ON dr.driver_id = r1.driver_id AND dr.year = r1.year AND dr.first_round = r1.round
JOIN races r2 ON dr.driver_id = r2.driver_id AND dr.year = r2.year AND dr.last_round = r2.round
JOIN results res1 ON r1.race_id = res1.race_id AND d.driver_id = res1.driver_id
JOIN results res2 ON r2.race_id = res2.race_id AND d.driver_id = res2.driver_id
WHERE dr.year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1959
  AND dr.first_round < dr.last_round
  AND res1.constructor_id = res2.constructor_id;

SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN drives dr ON d.driver_id = dr.driver_id
JOIN races r1 ON dr.driver_id = dr.driver_id AND dr.year = r1.year AND dr.first_round = r1.round
JOIN races r2 ON dr.driver_id = dr.driver_id AND dr.year = r2.year AND dr.last_round = r2.round
JOIN results res1 ON r1.race_id = res1.race_id AND d.driver_id = res1.driver_id
JOIN results res2 ON r2.race_id = res2.race_id AND d.driver_id = res2.driver_id
WHERE r1.year >= 1950 
  AND r1.year <= 1959
  AND dr.first_round < dr.last_round
  AND res1.constructor_id = res2.constructor_id

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.forename, d.surname
FROM drivers d
JOIN drives dr ON d.driver_id = dr.driver_id
JOIN races r1 ON dr.driver_id = dr.driver_id AND dr.year = r1.year AND dr.first_round = r1.round
JOIN races r2 ON dr.driver_id = dr.driver_id AND dr.year = r2.year AND dr.last_round = r2.round
JOIN results res1 ON r1.race_id = res1.race_id AND d.driver_id = res1.driver_id
JOIN results res2 ON r2.race_id = res2.race_id AND d.driver_id = res2.driver_id
WHERE r1.year >= 1950 
  AND r1.year <= 1959
  AND dr.first_round < dr.last_round
  AND res1.constructor_id = res2.constructor_id
